# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deploy

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    strategy:
      matrix:
        platform: ubuntu-latest || centos-latest
        node-version: 14.x || 16.x

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js ${{ matrix.node-version }}
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Run custom build scripts
      run: ./build.sh  # Replace this with the appropriate script path provided by developer

    - name: Run custom deployment commands
      run: ./deploy.sh  # Replace this with the appropriate script path provided by developer
